title: Analytics
subtitle: Deep insights into your vehicle expenses

yearly_estimate.title: Estimated Yearly Cost
yearly_estimate.description: Based on your current spending patterns, your estimated yearly vehicle cost is {{amount}}. This includes fuel, maintenance, and insurance.

next_expense.title: Next Expected Expense
next_expense.description: Your next scheduled maintenance is due in approximately 7 days or 500 km. Estimated cost: $180-$220.

above_average.title: Above Average Spending
above_average.description: You're spending 18% more than average users with similar vehicles. Consider reviewing your fuel efficiency and maintenance frequency.
